summary: Verified that a simplicity 🔴 finding in a multi-review run produces overall verdict FAIL even when all other roles return only 🟡/🔵. Implementation lives in bin/lib/flows.mjs (PARALLEL_REVIEW_ROLES includes 'simplicity'; mergeReviewFindings tags critical simplicity findings as [simplicity veto]) and bin/lib/run.mjs (multi-review path joins all role outputs and runs computeVerdict, so any 🔴 — including a simplicity veto — yields FAIL). Coverage exists at test/flows.test.mjs:276-289. All 590 tests pass.
